title: helicia ternifolia
intro: Helicia ternifolia, also known as the Ternate helicia or Mountain helicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Helicia ternifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Helicia ternifolia plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
